backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor defining a placeholder backend canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence describing a UX notice requirement and linking it to App.tsx and related components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of key frontend files, including App.tsx, index.css, Tailwind config, and index.html.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base theme defining color tokens, dark mode variables, and global text/background styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry document with SEO metadata and root mount point loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: React single‑page layout for the UNICO landing page with smooth scrolling, sections, branding, and footer.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook creating and refreshing a backend actor based on Internet Identity authentication state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Authentication context and provider wrapping AuthClient to manage Internet Identity login state.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind theme extension with UNICO brand navy/gold variables, global styling, and custom utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point wiring React Query, Internet Identity provider, and global styles before rendering App.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, animations, and design tokens for the UNICO theme.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing stack assumptions, existing features, and internal project state tracking.
